intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy, running the standard QC → normalization → HVG → PCA → clustering → UMAP pipeline.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present the plan:

input.title: Standard scanpy QC + clustering for GSM5746259 (Patient 145 Day 0)
input.summary: Load first sample, QC filter, normalize, identify HVGs, reduce dimensions (PCA/UMAP), cluster with Leiden, and visualize.

steps.title: Load the first sample
steps.description: Extract Patient_145_Day0 from the registered dataset and subset to single sample

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Compute n_genes_by_counts, total_counts, pct_counts_mt (mitochondrial %), and identify dying cells

steps.title: Filter cells
steps.description: Keep cells with n_genes >= 200 and mitochondrial % < 20%

steps.title: Normalize and log-transform
steps.description: Normalize to 10k reads/cell (normalize_total) and log1p transform

steps.title: Identify highly variable genes
steps.description: Rank genes by dispersion; default n_top_genes=2000
expected_outputs: HVG flags in .var; HVG plot (dispersion vs mean)

steps.title: Neighbors & UMAP
steps.description: Construct k-NN graph (k=15) and compute 2D UMAP embedding

steps.title: Leiden clustering
steps.description: Community detection on k-NN graph; resolution=1.0 (default)

steps.title: Visualizations
steps.description: HVG plot, PCA variance, UMAP colored by leiden cluster, and marker genes per cluster

assumptions: Using the first sample (Patient_145_Day0) only, not integrating with Day 7
Mitochondrial genes are prefixed 'MT-' (standard human annotation)
Default parameters: 200 gene minimum, 20% mito threshold, 2000 HVGs, Leiden resolution 1.0
Output plots at 150 DPI, colorblind-safe palettes (viridis)
